Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.reference

Interface MethodOrConstructorReference

All Superinterfaces:

All Known Subinterfaces:
ConstructorReference
All Known Implementing Classes:
MethodReference, New, SpecialConstructorReference, SuperConstructorReference, ThisConstructorReference
